title: Tempo of the Hunt
description: The Tempo appears in Scriptura's market district. A hunter who has been tracking the party since the forest. From World 1 novella ch7.

steps.text: The Tempo dropped from a rooftop into the street ahead of them. A figure in traveling leathers, built for speed rather than defense, wearing an expression of genuine pleasure.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: You made it to the city. I had calculated you would lose yourselves in the forest and give up.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: I even cleared one of the loop paths to give you a chance. I wanted you to last longer.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: Isn't it? You have an interesting way of moving through space. You cover each other's gaps without discussing it.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: The rogue is already three steps from where I expect.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: Don't let me catch you. That's not a threat. That's the game.
